articles.author: Lauren Forristal
articles.title: You can now edit your Instagram comments - TechCrunch
articles.description: Instagram users can now edit comments, which is a long-awaited fix for anyone who’s ever had to delete and re-post a comment just to fix a typo.
articles.content:
Instagram just introduced a small but useful update that people have been asking for forever: You can finally edit your comments. 
The platform announced on Thursday that users now have the option t… [+1893 chars]
